DESCRIPTION: Have #yTigermark  to trigger additional effects. If 0 at the start of turn, gain #yOverheat
Take damage equal to #yBurn stacks at the end of turn
Gain 5 Strength and 5 Dexterity (Cannot stack). For every 10 #yTigermark consumed in this battle, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity at the start of turn.
